subject: Accounting
title: Why Scandals Keep Happening
description: A quick, practical guide to Why Scandals Keep Happening.

hook.text: Every major scandal produces new rules. Then a new scandal finds a way around them.

buildup.text: Incentive structures still reward short-term results—bonuses, stock options, promotions.

discovery.text: When the reward for inflating numbers outweighs the perceived risk, some people will cheat.

twist.text: Technology makes fraud both harder to commit (analytics) and easier to commit (complexity).

climax.text: The real defense isn't more rules—it's ethical culture combined with smart detection.

punchline.text: Rules catch yesterday's fraud. Culture prevents tomorrow's.

quiz.question: Why do accounting scandals continue despite new regulations?
options: Incentive structures still reward short-term results
